title: polypodium dryopteris var. genuinum
intro: Polypodium dryopteris var. genuinum, also known as the Dryopteris polypodioides or False Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polypodium dryopteris var. genuinum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
